concerns: Risk item 2 (multi-pair values like '42, 43, 44') is a non-issue — CSV data confirmed to contain only single-integer PairsWith values throughout all 57 cards. The plan correctly identifies this as a risk but it does not apply to the current dataset.

Step 6 (play mode pairing with cross-feature navigation) adds scope and coupling beyond what the acceptance criteria require. The plan's own risk section acknowledges this can be deferred — recommend deferring play-mode pairing to a follow-up ticket and focusing on browse mode where the feature is most natural.

Scroll-to-card when filters are active (risk item 1) needs a concrete decision before implementation: clearing filters silently could confuse users. Prefer clearing filters and briefly highlighting the target card, with a small toast indicating filters were reset.
